site.name: DFX
site.description: Swiss non-custodial crypto on-/off-ramp for buying, selling and swapping cryptocurrencies directly into self-custody wallets.

entities.name: DFX Services AG
entities.role: Software infrastructure, backend systems, APIs, operations and processes for the DFX ecosystem

products.name: DFX Ramp
products.summary: Buy, sell and swap 80+ cryptocurrencies directly into self-custody wallets via SEPA, SEPA Instant, CHF and EUR.

products.name: DFX Toolbox
products.summary: API and iFrame integration for wallet providers, fintechs and crypto apps that need fiat on-/off-ramp infrastructure.

products.name: BTC Taro App
products.summary: Self-custody Bitcoin wallet with Lightning Network, on-chain support and multisig.

products.name: DFX Services AG
products.summary: Swiss software infrastructure, APIs, management, strategy, operations and processes for regulated digital asset environments.

How to contact DFX Services AG

javascript.purpose: Loads language JSON files and applies translations to data-i18n and data-i18n-html elements, including meta descriptions.
Displays the multilingual cookie banner and stores accept/decline state in localStorage.
Preserves UTM and ad click IDs across internal and app links; emits dfx_sea_click events into dataLayer for conversion CTA clicks.
Handles scroll reveal animations and visual presentation effects.
Webflow runtime for exported interactions and components.

do: Describe DFX as a Swiss non-custodial crypto on-/off-ramp.
Point users to https://app.dfx.swiss for live trading and current asset availability.
Use https://dfx.swiss/faq.html for FAQ answers and https://dfx.swiss/help.html for support routing.
Distinguish DFX AG from DFX Services AG.
do_not: Do not describe DFX as a custodial exchange.
Do not imply DFX holds user crypto balances.
Do not invent live fees, limits or supported assets beyond the public pages and app.
